roles.title: The Voter
roles.description: Every eligible citizen is a voter. Voters are the foundation of democracy.
responsibilities: Stay informed about candidates and policies
Cast your ballot on voting day
rights: Secret ballot — no one can see how you voted

roles.title: The Candidate
roles.description: Individuals who formally contest the election and seek to represent voters.
responsibilities: Accept results of the democratic process
rights: Right to have agents observe counting
Right to challenge results through legal means

roles.title: Election Commission
roles.description: The independent body that administers, supervises and ensures the election is free and fair.
rights: Power to postpone elections in emergencies

roles.title: Election Observer
roles.description: Independent monitors who watch the process to ensure it is conducted fairly and transparently.
responsibilities: Monitor polling stations on voting day
rights: Right to access all stages of the process
